sourceSummary.oneLine: Bill of materials for ADI board assemblies including MAIN, ROIC, GATE, and POWER PCB assemblies.
sourceSummary.officialUse: DHF electrical design and production BOM reference for PCB assemblies, component quantities, references, specifications, supplier/manufacturer notes, country, NC items, and long-lead/discontinued material notes.
keyPoints: The BOM title is listed as ADI_BD_BOM_20190717.
The document includes ADI_MAIN_PCB Ass'y, ADI_ROIC_PCB Ass'y, ADI_GATE_PCB Ass'y, and ADI_POWER_PCB Ass'y sections.
PCB assembly entries identify V006 or V007 PCB versions with FR4 layer count, board dimensions, thickness, and finish details.
Several components are marked as long lead-time materials, discontinued or expected discontinued, or NC.

entities.name: ADI_MAIN_V006_PCB Ass'y
entities.evidence: AB0-000001,ADI_MAIN_V006_PCB Ass'y,FR4 12L_240mm x 130mm x 1.6T(Green) V006 적용

entities.name: ADI_ROIC_V007_PCB Ass'y
entities.evidence: AB0-000002,ADI_ROIC_V007_PCB Ass'y,FR4 8L_427mm x 41.5mm x 1.0T(Green) V007 적용

entities.name: ADI_GATE_V006_PCB Ass'y
entities.evidence: AB0-000003,ADI_GATE_V006_PCB Ass'y,FR4 4L_402.5mm x 32.5mm x 1.0T(Green) V006 적용

entities.name: ADI_POWER_V006_PCB Ass'y
entities.evidence: AB0-000004,ADI_POWER_V006_PCB Ass'y,FR4 4L_160mm x 55mm x 1.6T(Green) V006 적용

evidence.claim: The BOM includes an ADI_MAIN_V006 PCB assembly with FR4 12-layer construction and 240 mm x 130 mm x 1.6T dimensions.
evidence.evidenceText: AB0-000001,ADI_MAIN_V006_PCB Ass'y,FR4 12L_240mm x 130mm x 1.6T(Green) V006 적용

evidence.claim: The BOM includes an ADI_ROIC_V007 PCB assembly with FR4 8-layer construction and 427 mm x 41.5 mm x 1.0T dimensions.
evidence.evidenceText: AB0-000002,ADI_ROIC_V007_PCB Ass'y,FR4 8L_427mm x 41.5mm x 1.0T(Green) V007 적용

evidence.claim: The BOM includes an ADI_GATE_V006 PCB assembly with FR4 4-layer construction and 402.5 mm x 32.5 mm x 1.0T dimensions.
evidence.evidenceText: AB0-000003,ADI_GATE_V006_PCB Ass'y,FR4 4L_402.5mm x 32.5mm x 1.0T(Green) V006 적용

evidence.claim: The BOM includes an ADI_POWER_V006 PCB assembly with FR4 4-layer construction and 160 mm x 55 mm x 1.6T dimensions.
evidence.evidenceText: AB0-000004,ADI_POWER_V006_PCB Ass'y,FR4 4L_160mm x 55mm x 1.6T(Green) V006 적용

evidence.claim: The BOM table fields include item, quantity, reference, code, item name, specification, remarks, and Excentec material used.
The ADI_MAIN PCB item specifies gold plating and glossy green FR4 V006 material.
The BOM contains NC sections for not-connected or not-installed materials.
Some materials are identified as long lead-time materials of five months or more.
Some materials are identified as expected discontinued.
Some TI parts are marked as designated consignment through WPG KOREA.
